      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF'
with open('/app/varsea/disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat', 'rb') as f:
    data = f.read()

# Search for patterns
import re
# Look for 14 uppercase alphanumeric chars
pattern = re.compile(b'[A-Z0-9]{14}')
for m in pattern.finditer(data):
    s = m.group().decode()
    if s.startswith('8XD') and s.endswith('W54'):
        print(f'Found at {m.start()}: {s}')
        
# Also search for PASSWORD= followed by 14 chars
pattern2 = re.compile(b'PASSWORD=([A-Z0-9]{14})')
for m in pattern2.finditer(data):
    print(f'Found PASSWORD={m.group(1).decode()} at {m.start()}')
EOF
